footer.contact: Want to collaborate and test the engine? Get in touch

hero.title: Office of Accountability
hero.subtitle: An engine that searches, validates, and consolidates findings from public data. Knowledge graph, automated verification, human review at every step.

graph.title: Knowledge graph
graph.description: Native graph database (Neo4j) connecting entities, relationships, and evidence.

timeline.title: Automated ingestion
timeline.description: Connectors that import data from APIs, court documents, public records, and scraping.

evidence.title: Verification and factcheck
evidence.description: Every finding is verified against sources and classified by confidence level (gold/silver/bronze).

community.title: AI with human review
community.description: LLM proposes, humans approve. Nothing is published without review at every pipeline stage.

network.title: Network analysis
network.description: Centrality algorithms, community detection, and temporal patterns on the graph.

money.title: Reproducible and auditable
money.description: Every action logged with hash chain. Investigations are replicable end to end.

metadata.siteDescription: Civic knowledge platform for Argentine politics. Investigation engine on knowledge graphs with automated verification and human review.

caso-libra.title: Libra Case: The President's Memecoin
caso-libra.description: Milei promoted $LIBRA to 19M followers. The price collapsed 94% in hours. 114,000+ wallets lost $251M+.

caso-epstein.title: Epstein Case: Trafficking and power network
caso-epstein.description: 7,276 entities and 11,040 documented relationships. Court documents, flight records, 77 fact checks.

caso-dictadura.description: Argentine military dictatorship. 9,415 documented victims, 774 clandestine detention centers, 987 declassified SIDE pages.

finanzas-politicas.description: Campaign financing, sworn asset declarations, offshore companies, and connections between politicians and corporations.

obras-publicas.description: Public works contract traceability: CONTRAT.AR, MapaInversiones, Odebrecht, Cuadernos, Siemens.

riesgo-nuclear.description: Tracking signals that could indicate nuclear risk escalation: military developments, official statements, treaties.

caso-libra.description: Milei promoted $LIBRA to 19M followers. The price collapsed 94% in hours. 114,000+ wallets lost $251M+.

caso-epstein.description: 7,276 entities and 11,040 documented relationships. Court documents, flight records, 77 fact checks.

caso-dictadura.title: Dictatorship Case: 1976-1983
caso-dictadura.subtitle: Active investigation
caso-dictadura.description: Argentine military dictatorship. 9,415 documented victims, 774 clandestine detention centers, 987 declassified SIDE pages, 54 accountability gaps flagged.

finanzas-politicas.title: Argentine Political Finance
finanzas-politicas.subtitle: Active investigation
finanzas-politicas.description: Campaign financing, sworn asset declarations, offshore companies, and connections between politicians and corporations.

monopolios.title: Monopolies in Argentina
monopolios.subtitle: Active investigation — 18 sectors
monopolios.description: Monopolized markets: telecommunications, energy, food, media, banking, mining, agro-exports, construction, pharmaceuticals. 829+ Neo4j cross-references, 75 verified claims.

obras-publicas.title: Argentine Public Works
obras-publicas.subtitle: Active investigation — 30 waves of enrichment
obras-publicas.description: Public works contract traceability: CONTRAT.AR, MapaInversiones, Odebrecht, Cuadernos, Siemens. 56,122 entities, 13,277 cross-references against the political finance graph.

riesgo-nuclear.title: Global Nuclear Risk
riesgo-nuclear.subtitle: Daily monitoring of nuclear escalation signals
riesgo-nuclear.description: Tracking signals that could indicate nuclear risk escalation: military developments, official statements, treaties, missile tests, and OSINT data from 31 sources.

i.label: The first test
i.title: Libra Case: The President's Memecoin
i.body: Milei promoted $LIBRA to 19 million followers. The price collapsed 94% in hours. The engine processed blockchain transactions, parliamentary documents, and social media. $251M+ in losses, 114K wallets affected.

ii.label: Scaling test
ii.title: Epstein Case: Trafficking and power network
ii.body: A case with thousands of documents, hundreds of actors, decades of history. 7,276 entities, 374 actors, 1,044 court documents processed. The engine scaled.

iii.label: The discovery
iii.title: Argentine Political Finance
iii.body: We started with the Como Voto datasets. We expanded to sworn declarations, offshore companies, campaign financing. 329 legislators, 7 cross-referenced data sources.

iv.label: Open data
iv.title: Public Works and Monopolies
iv.body: Public works contracts: CONTRAT.AR, MapaInversiones, Odebrecht, Cuadernos. 56,122 entities, 7,486 projects, 13,277 cross-references. In parallel, 18 monopolized sectors. USD 22.5B in estimated annual cost.

v.label: March 24, 2026
v.title: Dictatorship Case: 1976–1983
v.body: Argentine military dictatorship. Multiple ingestion pipelines consolidated into a unified graph. 9,415 victims, 774 clandestine detention centers, 14,512 nodes.

vi.label: In development
vi.title: Global Nuclear Risk
vi.body: Daily monitoring of nuclear escalation signals. 31 sources, 9 monitored nuclear states.

transitions.1: The engine worked. But we needed to test it with something bigger.
transitions.2: Results improved with each new data source. We decided to expand.
transitions.3: The results were surprising. But public works and monopolies were still missing.
transitions.4: March 24th brought new information. The Argentine military dictatorship deserved its own investigation.

phase-1.title: Phase 1 — Knowledge graph + Investigations
phase-1.goal: Graph database with verified public data, visual explorer, and first published investigations.

phase-2.title: Phase 2 — Autonomous investigation engine
phase-2.goal: Automated pipeline: the engine searches, validates, consolidates, and reports findings with human review at every step.
features: LLM-assisted with human review at each stage (human-at-the-gates)
Data connectors: APIs, scrapers, court documents

phase-3.title: Phase 3 — Advanced AI + Public API
phase-3.goal: Advanced graph queries, automated suggestions, and API for journalists and researchers.
features: AI to suggest related nodes and summarize documents
Public API for journalists and researchers

phase-4.title: Phase 4 — Community + Governance
phase-4.goal: Community investigations, coalitions, endorsements, and consensus mechanisms.
features: Collaborative investigation editor with graph embeds
Investigation coalitions with roles and reputation
Endorsement system for claims and evidence

phase-5.title: Phase 5 — Accountability
phase-5.goal: Algorithmic scoring, citizen mandates, and provincial coverage.
features: Citizen mandates linked to the graph
